stage:
screen -S scitex-orochi -X stuff 'Please work on the following tasks for scitex-orochi:

1. Add list-agents command: scan ~/.scitex/orochi/agents/ and list all agent YAMLs with name, role, machine, status
2. Test agent connectivity: try launching master agent from YAML, verify it connects to orochi WebSocket
3. Verify the webhook is working: check scitex-orochi.com/webhook/telegram/ receives messages

Relevant issues: todo#173 (status/health CLI), orochi#8 (token ownership - closed), orochi#9 (bidirectional dep - closed)

The YAML configs are at ~/.scitex/orochi/agents/*/'
